decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id is project_34th-st-sbs-2012, which already exists as a registry record. The observation's source (201203_brt_34th_cac6) is already in that registry card's source_ids. The observation already resolves to its correct canonical record — no link to a different record is needed. Per rule: when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Since the last CAC, DOT & NYCT have ... – Implemented off-board fare collection – Completed environmental review – Released the Project Analysis Report – Initiated design work of the project
